title: PublicServiceProgram
description: A record in the NYC Law Department's Public Service Program — the pro bono program under which private law firms donate legal services to the City. Canonical schema reconciling 'LAW Public Service Program' (yk6f-pa7p), which lists firms donating services since 2007.

firm.description: Firm donating services ('Firms Donating Services Since 2007').

sinceYear.description: Year the firm began donating services (program runs since 2007).
